descriptionShort: Winnipeg Jets pre-season game article featuring goaltender Rick Tabaracci's demotion and rookie Shawn Cronin's physical play.
descriptionLong: The Winnipeg Sun reports on a Jets-Canucks pre-season game and roster moves. Goaltender Rick Tabaracci was reassigned to the farmclub Moncton Hawks after allowing 10 goals in two pre-season games. Rookie defenceman Shawn Cronin impressed with physical play despite skating limitations. The Jets tied Vancouver 3-3, with goals from Dale Hawerchuk, Matt Hervey, and Dave McIlwain.
